subject: Re: Great meeting you at Chamber Connections
body:
Hi Duncan,

Same here! I would love to let you know about what iTHINK has to offer for personal and business.

I would be available for a phone call. I get into the office normally at 8:00 and can be available anytime after 8:15. Let me know what date and time works for you and we can set it up.

Thanks,


ILEANA WILLIAMS

Member Service Advisor III

11317 Okeechobee Blvd.

Royal Palm Beach, Fl. 33411
